meta.home: Free, open-source public data about Bosnia and Herzegovina. Browse universities and academic programs via REST API or interactive interface.
meta.universities: Explore universities and academic programs in Bosnia and Herzegovina.
meta.api: REST API documentation for Bosnia Lens. Access universities and academic programs data programmatically.
meta.login: Log in to your Bosnia Lens account to contribute data and track your submissions.
meta.signup: Create a free Bosnia Lens account to start contributing university data.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.needLogin: You need to be logged in. Redirected to the login page.

home.title: Home Page
home.heading: Welcome to Bosnia Lens
home.intro: A free, open-source project building a structured, searchable database of public data about Bosnia and Herzegovina. Focused on universities - institutions, faculties, study programs, and subjects.
home.exploreDescription: Browse universities across Bosnia and Herzegovina. View faculties, study programs, and subjects. Search by name, city, or acronym.

universities.title: Universities
universities.description: Browse universities, faculties, study programs, and subjects across Bosnia and Herzegovina.

home.improveDescription: Know something that's missing or incorrect? Registered users can suggest changes - additions, edits, or deletions - which are reviewed and applied by admins.
home.improveStep1: Create a free account and confirm your email
home.improveStep2: Go to the Improve Data page and submit your suggestion
home.improveStep3: Admins review submissions and apply approved changes to the live dataset
home.forDevsDescription: Bosnia Lens exposes a free, unauthenticated REST API. Fetch all universities, search by name or city, retrieve full detail for a single university, or search study programs across all institutions.
home.forDevsNote: No authentication required for public endpoints.

api.title: REST API
api.publicIntro: Public REST endpoints are available under the base URL below. These endpoints do not require authentication.
api.authIntro: Authenticated endpoints are separate from the public base URL and use session cookies plus CSRF tokens for write operations.
api.dataObjectExample:
{
  "id":          number   - unique identifier
  "name":        string   - university name
  "acronym":     string | null
  "city":        string
  "entity":      "FBIH" | "RS" | "BD"
  "ownership":   "JAVNA" | "PRIVATNA"
  "foundedYear": number | null
  "website":     string | null
  "faculties":   Faculty[]
}
api.authFlowBody: These endpoints require an authenticated session (credentials: include) and use CSRF protection for mutating requests.

endpointsData.getAllUniversities: Retrieve all universities, ordered by name.
endpointsData.searchUniversities: Search universities by name, city, or acronym (case-insensitive, minimum 2 characters).
endpointsData.getUniversityById: Retrieve a university by ID with full nested detail (faculties, study programs, subjects).
endpointsData.searchStudyPrograms: Search study programs by name across all universities (case-insensitive, minimum 2 characters).
endpointsData.csrfIssue: Issue a CSRF token used in the x-csrf-token header for mutating requests.
endpointsData.authSignup: Register a pending account and send a confirmation email.
endpointsData.authConfirm: Confirm signup token and create the user account.
endpointsData.contributionCreate: Suggest a new university entity (stored as pending change).
endpointsData.contributionUpdate: Suggest an edit to a university entity (stored as pending change).
endpointsData.contributionDelete: Suggest deletion of a university entity (stored as pending change).
endpointsData.contributionPendingDelete: Remove one of your own pending suggestions.
endpointsData.adminApprove: Approve a pending suggestion and apply it to the live dataset.

contribution.needUser: You need to be a registered user to propose changes to the content.
contribution.selectDatasetError: You need to select a dataset.

admin.needAdmin: You need to be an admin to see the admin dashboard.
admin.needLoginAndAdmin: You need to be logged in and an admin to see the admin dashboard.
admin.noPendingChanges: There are no pending changes at the moment.

longWait.unreachable: Server can't be reached after multiple attempts. Please try again later.
longWait.wakingUp: Getting response from the server is taking longer than expected (server might be waking up). Please wait...
